title: Clicking on items and filtering in shared calendar views - is it possible?

posts.author: JordanJohnston (Jordan Johnston)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m trying to share a calendar view of a board focusing on only confirmed events and webinars.

Is it possible for viewers to click on any items to see more details about the event or webinar?

It appears that viewers can only view the date the event or webinar is on or if they’re “tech savy” with a few clicks they can see all the items I’m sharing on a board with more details. However, this requires several clicks and lots of scrolling so isn’t handy in my use case.

Also is it possible to add filters to the calendar view so that viewers can filter the calendar view to only view events/webinars/industry etc.?

Thanks the help.

posts.author: JaredJLY (Jared Young)
posts.cookedHtml: Bump, I am also needing this feature.
